scripts.db:generate: corepack pnpm --filter web exec prisma generate
scripts.db:migrate: corepack pnpm --filter web exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:migrate:dev: corepack pnpm --filter web exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:studio: corepack pnpm --filter web exec prisma studio
scripts.setup:local: docker compose up -d && corepack pnpm run db:migrate && corepack pnpm run db:generate
